name: Salt Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: Wash chicken and pat dry. Stuff the cavity with sherry; add ginger, garlic, and green onions. Seal with a clip or string. Rub dark soy sauce on the outside of the chicken. Let it sit until the soy sauce is absorbed. Wrap the chicken in three layers of parchment paper, tie with string, and coat the outer layer with peanut oil.
Baking: In a wok or large pot, heat rock salt until it begins to brown. Place the wrapped chicken in the hot rock salt, spooning some salt around the sides and over top. Cook for about 10 minutes. Turn the chicken over and continue cooking, covering with more rock salt (always keeping at least a 2-inch layer of salt under the chicken). Increase baking time to 15 minutes on each side for well-done chicken. Remove from salt; unwrap and let stand for 15 minutes to cool and congeal juices. Cut into halves, then bite-size pieces. Serve with soy dip.
